description: Composition:Brown leather sandals with multi-coloured strapsshoe care:Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustFitting:Regular FitTalk about simple and elegant sandals, and this is the right choice. These brown leather sandals from catwalk with multi-colored straps are designed for comfort, while their deep colours make them a great pair for casual wear. Team them with capris, denims or skirts for a stroll or an outing with friends.
